_meta.keyKnowledge: We investigate needs or opportunities for designing, and the materials, tools and processes needed to create solutions.

_source.w: We investigate needs or opportunities for designing, and the materials, tools and processes needed to create solutions.
y: Thorough investigation before designing leads to better, more thoughtful solutions.
Understanding available materials and processes helps us plan realistic projects.
Research and investigation are skills that professional designers use every day.
eg: We identify a real need in our community and research existing solutions.
We investigate which materials, tools and techniques would work best for our project.
We create a design brief that outlines the problem, requirements and constraints.
We research how similar products have been designed and what we can learn from them.
We test materials and processes before committing to our final design approach.
We consider cost, availability and environmental impact when selecting materials.
